title: swertia javanica subsp. cocrulescens
intro: Swertia javanica subsp. cocrulescens is a subspecies of the Swertia javanica plant, a type of flowering plant in the gentian family (Gentianaceae). It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. Swertia javanica subsp. cocrulescens can be used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for skin issues.
